summary: Completed backend testing of Benevolence Distribution features for 501/508-style trusts. All 17 tests passed covering POST/PATCH /api/distributions with benevolence validation, GET /api/benevolence-log aggregates, and Governance Health Score integration.
passed_tests: POST /api/distributions with is_benevolence=true requires benevolence_recipient_name (400 if missing)
POST /api/distributions with is_benevolence=true requires benevolence_need_description (400 if missing)
POST /api/distributions with is_benevolence=true and all required fields succeeds (200)
POST /api/distributions with is_benevolence=false works without benevolence fields
POST /api/distributions defaults is_benevolence=false when not provided
PATCH /api/distributions/{id} can update benevolence fields (recipient_name, need_description, notes)
PATCH /api/distributions/{id} validates required fields when setting is_benevolence=true
PATCH /api/distributions/{id} allows converting non-benevolence to benevolence with required fields
GET /api/benevolence-log returns correct response structure (trust_id, trust_name, distributions, aggregates)
GET /api/benevolence-log returns monthly aggregates with YYYY-MM format
GET /api/benevolence-log returns yearly aggregates with integer year
Distribution Documentation criterion description shows benevolence documentation status
Distribution Documentation points reduced (10/20) when benevolence distributions lack approval/minutes
Distribution Documentation full points (20/20) when all benevolence distributions fully documented
seed_data_creation: All test distributions were created and cleaned up during test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Benevolence distribution feature fully tested. Test distribution dist_6ab9073e6164 was deleted as requested. Health score now shows 20/20 for Distribution Documentation since no incomplete benevolence distributions remain. The benevolence_log endpoint correctly aggregates benevolence distributions by month/year and tracks incomplete documentation count. Validation properly requires benevolence_recipient_name and benevolence_need_description when is_benevolence=true.
